title: Fix: Send in-app notifications to all faculty when Student Coordinator registers

requirements.text: When a Student Coordinator successfully registers (profile is created with role 'StudentCoordinator'), the backend must automatically create an in-app notification for every existing faculty account. The notification message must indicate that a new Student Coordinator account is pending approval, including the coordinator's name and email. This notification creation must happen inside the profile registration logic in the main actor.

quotes: when student coordinator create our account so they show pending faculty approval but faculty dont get any notification to verify student coordinator
should it appears as an in app notification
go to all faculty account and any one faculty verify it

acceptanceCriteria: When registerProfile is called with role StudentCoordinator, the backend iterates all stored user profiles and creates a notification for every profile with role Faculty.
Each faculty notification contains the coordinator's name, email, and principal, and is tagged so the frontend can render Approve/Reject actions.
Notifications are persisted in the backend notification store and retrievable via the existing getUserNotifications method for each faculty principal.

requirements.text: In the NotificationsDashboard component, faculty users must see pending Student Coordinator approval notifications rendered with the coordinator's name, email, and Approve / Reject action buttons. When a faculty member approves or rejects, the coordinator's verification status must be updated and the notification must be marked as resolved (removed or dismissed) for all faculty accounts.

quotes: Faculty will see it in their Notifications tab with the coordinator's name/email and Approve / Reject buttons
Once any faculty member acts on it, the Student Coordinator's status updates and the notification is resolved for others

acceptanceCriteria: Faculty Notifications tab shows a card for each pending coordinator with the coordinator's display name and email visible.
Each card has an Approve button and a Reject button; clicking either calls the appropriate backend mutation.
After one faculty member approves or rejects, the coordinator's verification status in their profile is updated accordingly.
After approval or rejection, the notification is cleared from all faculty accounts' notification lists (backend removes or marks it resolved for all faculty principals).
The Student Coordinator's profile Verification Status badge updates to Approved or Rejected upon the next fetch after faculty action.

requirements.text: Add or update a backend method (e.g., resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications) that, when any faculty member approves or rejects a pending Student Coordinator, removes or marks as resolved the corresponding verification-request notification for ALL faculty principals — not just the acting faculty member.

quotes: Once one faculty acts on it, the request is resolved and the notification is cleared for others

acceptanceCriteria: Calling approve or reject for a coordinator triggers removal of that coordinator's pending-approval notification from every faculty account's notification list.
After resolution, no faculty account sees the already-acted-upon coordinator notification in their Notifications tab.

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Notification creation for faculty must occur atomically within the existing profile registration flow — do not introduce a separate service or canister.
Reuse existing notification data types and storage structures already defined in backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Email or SMS notifications to faculty — only in-app bell notifications are required.
Restricting which faculty member can approve (any faculty member may act).
Changes to the booking request workflow — this fix is scoped to Student Coordinator account verification only.
Admin role involvement in the coordinator verification flow.
